name: Pricing

props.headline: Replace Multiple Expensive Subscriptions & Save Up To $10,600 Per Year

bodyBlock.content:
Why pay for dozens of disconnected platforms when you can manage your entire business from one powerful ecosystem? Our flexible pricing plans combine CRM, marketing, funnels, websites, automation, communications, bookings, communities, AI tools, and more into one streamlined platform designed to save businesses thousands every year while simplifying operations and boosting productivity.

Choose a complete business bundle or scale individual modules independently as your business grows. Whether you are a solo operator or managing a growing team, our platform gives you the flexibility to only pay for what you need while keeping everything connected from one powerful command centre.

props.leftTitle: Our FREE Gift To You! - 14 Day FREE Trial
props.rightTitle:
Get Started Risk-Free

We understand that setting up a new business platform takes time. That's why every Gr8 Result Digital Solutions subscription includes a full 14-day free trial, giving you the opportunity to explore the platform, configure your settings, import your data, and get everything running exactly the way you want it before paying a cent. We don't want you wasting valuable trial days learning the system or rushing through your setup.

Our goal is to give you the time and confidence to properly onboard your business, familiarise yourself with the platform, and begin experiencing the benefits for yourself. As an added welcome bonus, businesses subscribing to our Starter, Growth, or Scale plans will receive an incredible 50% discount on their first 3 months after their free trial ends.

This helps keep your costs low while you settle into the platform and begin taking advantage of everything Gr8 Result Digital Solutions has to offer. Your card will not be charged during the 14-day trial period.

Once your trial ends, your first three months will be charged at the discounted rate, after which your selected plan will simply renew monthly at the standard subscription price. No pressure. No hidden surprises. Just a smarter, simpler way to grow your business with the tools you need, all in one place.

Take your time, get set up properly, and discover why more businesses are choosing Gr8 Result Digital Solutions as their all-in-one growth platform.
props.leftContent: Plus, as a special welcome gift, we're giving all new Starter, Growth, and Scale customers 50% OFF their first 3 months subscription. We want you to have the time to fully implement the platform, explore its powerful features, and start seeing real results before paying full price. It's our way of helping your business get off to the best possible start while keeping costs low during those important first few months.

headlineBlock.content: Replace Multiple Expensive Subscriptions & Save Up To $10,600 Per Year

extraTextOverlays.text: Our Pricing Plans

Simple, Flexible Pricing Designed To Grow With Your Business

At Gr8 Result Digital Solutions, we believe businesses shouldn't be forced to pay for features they don't need. That's why we've created a flexible pricing structure that allows you to choose the package that best suits your business today, while giving you the freedom to upgrade, customise, and scale as your needs evolve.
Whether you're a startup, growing business, or established enterprise, you'll have access to the powerful tools, automation, AI features, marketing systems, and business management solutions needed to help you work smarter, save time, and achieve better results.
Choose the plan that's right for you and discover how easy it can be to manage, market, and scale your business from one powerful platform.

items.text: “We were paying for multiple subscriptions before finding this platform. Now everything is in one place and our team productivity has gone through the roof.”
